title.ko: 달리 분류되지 않는 액체의 분배, 방출 또는 이송(관 또는 튜브의 세정, 관 또는 튜브 시스템의 세정 B08B 9/02; 달리 분류되지 않는 병, 단지, 캔, 나무통, 통 또는 유사 용기를 비우거나 충전 B67C; 물의 공급 E03; 배관 장치 F17D; 옥내 온수 공급 장치 F24D; 체적, 체적유량, 물질 유량 또는 액위 측정, 체적에 의한 계량 G01F; 코인에 의해 작동되는 장치 또는 이와 유사한 장치 G07F)
title.en: DISPENSING, DELIVERING, OR TRANSFERRING LIQUIDS, NOT OTHERWISE PROVIDED FOR (cleaning pipes or tubes or systems of pipes or tubes B08B0009020000;emptying or filling of bottles, jars, cans, casks, barrels, or similar containers, not otherwise provided for B67C;water supply E03;pipe systems F17D;domestic hot-water supply systems F24D;measuring volume, volume flow, mass flow or liquid level, metering by volume G01F;coin-freed or like apparatus G07F)

title.ko: 통에서 따라내는 것에 의한 음료의 분배 장치(B67D 3/00 이 우선, 코피, 차 또는 유사 음료의 제조장치 A47J 31/00 )
title.en: Apparatus or devices for dispensing beverages on draught (B67D0003000000 takes precedence;apparatus for making beverages A47J0031000000)
Beer engines or like manually-operable pumping apparatus
Apparatus utilising compressed air or other gas acting directly or indirectly on beverages in storage containers

title.ko: 상점 또는 바의 카운터에 있어서의 분배장치의 설비 또는 배치(상점 또는 주장의 카운터 그 자체 47F 9/00 )
title.en: Mountings or arrangements of dispensing apparatus in or on shop or bar counters (shop or bar counters per seA47F0009000000)
Cleaning beverage-dispensing apparatus
Details
Pump mechanisms (in general F04)
Flow- or pressure-control devices or systems
Reducing valves or control taps
Devices for collecting spilled beverages

title.ko: 분배를 위한 저장 용기로부터의 중력에 의한 유출의 제어장치(계량된 액체의 분리와 분배 G01F)
title.en: Apparatus or devices for controlling flow of liquids under gravity from storage containers for dispensing purposes (separating and dispensing metered quantities of liquids G01F)
Liquid-dispensing valves having operating members arranged to be pressed upwards, e.g. by the rims of receptacles held below the delivery orifice
Liquid-dispensing taps or cocks adapted to seal and open tapping-holes of casks, e.g. for beer

title.ko: 대형 저장용기 또는 저장조에서 운반용 용기 또는 휴대용 용기로 유체를 이송하기위한 장치 및 기구, 예. 소매용의 것(차량에 연료를 공급하기위한 시설의 일반적인 배치 B60S 5/02; 기관차 물탱크를 채우거나 비우는 것. 예. 워터컬럼 B61K 11/00; 비행동안 항공기에 재연료공급을 위한 것 B64D 39/00; 정지하고 있는 항공기에 연료를 보급하는 데 특히 적합한 액체 조작 설비 B64F 1/28)
title.en: Apparatus or devices for transferring liquids from bulk storage containers or reservoirs into vehicles or into portable containers, e.g. for retail sale purposes (general disposition of plant in stations for supplying fuel to vehicles B60S0005020000;for filling or emptying locomotive water tanks, e.g. water columns, B61K0011000000;for refuelling aircraft during flight B64D0039000000;liquid-handling ground installations specially adapted for fuelling stationary aircraft B64F0001280000)
for transferring liquids other than fuel or lubricants
for transferring fuels, lubricants or mixed fuels and lubricants
Details or accessories

title.ko: 이송된 액체의 양 또는 가격의 제어, 지시, 계량 또는 기록을 위한 장치 또는 기구(유량 또는 압력 제어 밸브 배치 B67D 7/36; 계산에 관한 사항 G06; 액체 분배를 위한 코인 투입식 작동 장치 G07F 13/00; 액체 계량을 위한 선불요금 장치 G07F 15/00)
title.en: Arrangements of devices for controlling, indicating, metering or registering quantity or price of liquid transferred (arrangement of flow- or pressure-control valves B67D0007360000;computing, calculating, counting G06;coin-freed apparatus for dispensing fluids G07F0013000000;prepayment devices for metering liquids G07F0015000000)
operated by keys, push-buttons or cash registers
operated by movement of delivery hose or nozzle or by devices associated therewith
responsive to input of recorded programmed information, e.g. on punched cards
Arrangements of liquid meters
of piston type
of rotary type

title.ko: 지시기 또는 기록기 장치(액체 계량기의 지시 또는 기록 G01F 15/06)
title.en: Arrangements of indicators or registers (indicating or recording in fluid meters G01F0015060000)
with means for producing or issuing a receipt or record of sale
with resetting or zeroing means
with automatic means for reducing or intermittently interrupting flow before completion of delivery, e.g. to produce dribble feed

title.ko: 이송되어야 할 액체의 양을 예정하는 장치가 있는 것(B67D 5/10, 5/14가 우선)
title.en: with means for predetermining quantity of liquid to be transferred (B67D0007100000, B67D0007140000 take precedence)
Arrangements of safety or warning devices; Means for preventing unauthorised delivery of liquid
Means for preventing unauthorised delivery of liquid

title.ko: 유량 또는 압력 제어 밸브의 배열(노즐과 관련있는 것 B67D 5/37)
title.en: Arrangements of flow- or pressure-control valves (associated with nozzles B67D0007420000)

title.ko: 호스 장치, 예. 펌프 모터와 연결 운전되는 것(호스 일반 F16L 11/00 )
title.en: Arrangements of hoses, e.g. operative connection with pump motor (hoses in general F16L0011000000)

title.ko: 달아매기, 감기 또는 보관장치(장척 호스 저장을 위한 지지구 일반 B65H 75/34)
title.en: Suspending, reeling or storing devices (supports for storing lengths of hoses, in general B65H0075340000)

title.ko: 충전 노즐(노즐 일반 B05B; 액체 공급 밸브 일반 F16K 21/00 )
title.en: Filling nozzles
automatically closing
when liquid in container to be filled reaches a predetermined level
by making use of air suction through an opening closed by the rising liquid
and provided with an additional hand lever
and provided with additional flow-controlling valve means

title.ko: 액체 또는 증기의 누설 방지를 위하거나 누설된 액체 또는 증기를 회수하기 위한 수단을 갖는 것(B67D 7/44이 우선)
title.en: with means for preventing escape of liquid or vapour or for recovering escaped liquid or vapour (B67D0007440000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 유량 지시계 장치, 예. 투명의 구획실, 창, 회전 날개(유동의 유무 또는 방향의 지시 또는 기록 G01P 13/00)
title.en: Arrangements of flow-indicators, e.g. transparent compartments, windows, rotary vanes (indicating or recording presence, absence or direction of movement G01P0013000000)
Arrangements of pumps
manually operable
power operated
of piston type
of rotary type
submerged in storage tank or reservoir
of two or more pumps in series or parallel
Devices for applying air or other gas pressure for forcing liquid to delivery point

title.ko: 이송되어야 할 2이상의 상위한 액체의 혼합 장치(코인 투입 작동 장치 G07F 13/06)
title.en: Devices for mixing two or more different liquids to be transferred (coin-freed apparatus G07F0013060000)
Arrangements of devices for purifying liquids to be transferred, e.g. of filters, of air or water separators
Arrangements of storage tanks, reservoirs or pipe-lines
Arrangements of heating or cooling devices for liquids to be transferred
Heating only
Casings, cabinets or frameworks; Trolleys or like movable supports
Illuminating arrangements

title.ko: 선박에의 선적 또는 하역 (선박에 관련된 장치 B63B 27/00 )
title.en: Apparatus or devices for transferring liquids when loading or unloading ships (ship-based equipment B63B0027000000)
using articulated pipes
Subject matter not provided for in other groups of this subclass
